description: Lesson & Review UI Improvements - UX enhancements for visual clarity, feedback timing, mnemonic rendering, and navigation flow

userStories.title: Add visual indicator bar for question type
userStories.description: As a user, I want to immediately see whether I'm being asked for a reading or meaning so I don't accidentally enter the wrong type of answer.
acceptanceCriteria: Full-width horizontal bar at the top of quiz card (8-12px height)
Black bar for reading questions
White bar with subtle border for meaning questions
Bar visible on both LessonQuiz and ReviewSession components
Unit tests verify correct bar color based on question type
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Increase correct answer feedback duration
userStories.description: As a user, I want the correct answer animation to last slightly longer so I can appreciate the positive feedback before moving on.
acceptanceCriteria: Change autoAdvanceDelay from 200ms to 500ms in LessonQuiz
Change equivalent delay in ReviewSession if applicable
Unit tests verify the timing constant value is 500ms
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Create MnemonicText component for tag parsing
userStories.description: As a user, I want mnemonic text with <radical>, <kanji>, and <vocabulary> tags to render with appropriate highlight colors.
acceptanceCriteria: Create MnemonicText component that parses XML-like tags
<radical> text highlighted with blue color (#00AAFF)
<kanji> text highlighted with pink color (#FF00AA)
<vocabulary> text highlighted with purple color (#AA00FF)
Regular text renders normally between tags
Nested or malformed tags handled gracefully (render as plain text)
Unit tests cover parsing logic and edge cases
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Integrate MnemonicText in lesson and review screens
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see highlighted mnemonics in LessonCard, LessonQuiz incorrect feedback, and ReviewSession.
acceptanceCriteria: MnemonicText component used in LessonCard for mnemonic content
MnemonicText used in LessonQuiz incorrect answer feedback
MnemonicText used in ReviewSession for mnemonic content
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add back button to lesson navigation
userStories.description: As a user, I want to go back to a previous lesson card if I need to review it again before continuing.
acceptanceCriteria: Back button appears when currentIndex > 0 in LessonBatch
Back button positioned on the left side of the card footer
Next button remains on the right side
Back button decrements currentIndex
First item shows only Next button (no back)
Unit tests verify navigation state and button visibility
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add swipe gestures to lesson cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want to swipe left/right on lesson cards for quick navigation between items.
acceptanceCriteria: Swipe left advances to next item (same as tapping Next)
Swipe right goes back to previous item (same as tapping Back)
Swipe right on first item does nothing
Swipe left on last item completes the batch
Swipe gesture has appropriate threshold to avoid accidental triggers
Works alongside tap navigation (buttons still functional)
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Implementation complete. PanResponder functional tests require manual verification as gesture state is managed internally by React Native. Structural tests verify swipe area and handlers exist.

userStories.title: Fix lesson completion auto-advance bug
userStories.description: As a user, I want to stay on the completion screen after finishing a lesson batch until I choose to continue or return to dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: After quiz completion, user sees LessonCompletion screen
Screen remains visible until user taps a button
No automatic navigation to next batch
Continue button still available for users who want to proceed
Return to Dashboard button takes user back to home
Regression test verifies completion screen waits for user input
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
userStories.notes: Implementation verified - no auto-advance bug existed. Added regression tests to confirm LessonCompletion component waits for user input before navigation.

userStories.title: Auto-focus input on question change
userStories.description: As a user, I want the input textbox to automatically focus when a new question appears so I can keep typing without tapping the input field.
acceptanceCriteria: TextInput automatically receives focus when a new question is displayed
Focus is triggered after advancing from correct answer feedback
Focus is triggered after tapping Continue on incorrect feedback
Keyboard remains open between questions (no dismiss/reopen flicker)
Works in both LessonQuiz and ReviewSession components
Unit tests verify focus is called on question change
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
userStories.notes: Implemented using useRef and useEffect. Focus is triggered with a 100ms delay after question changes to ensure the input is rendered and ready. Focus is only triggered when not showing feedback and when the quiz/session is not complete.

userStories.title: Fix input positioning to prevent keyboard overlap
userStories.description: As a user, I want the input field positioned near the top of its area (below the question prompt) so it is never covered by the on-screen keyboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Input field positioned immediately below the question prompt with appropriate spacing
Input is NOT vertically centered in remaining space
Input remains fully visible when keyboard is open
Layout works correctly on both iOS and Android
Reading conversion display (hiragana) still appears above input when typing
Works in both LessonQuiz and ReviewSession components
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
